creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Although the documentation continues to refer to pointyhat.freebsd.org
	(and did so for years) the host is currently not resolvable.

	Either the documentation at:

	http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/contributing-ports/resources.html

	needs fixing, or the DNS record should be put back into place
	pointing if not to the original, then to whatever is currently
	the closest substitute.

How-To-Repeat: 	nslookup pointyhat.freebsd.org
